parameters.name: subTomoMeta
parameters.description: Name of the subTomoMeta metadata file (project name). Parsed as a string value.

parameters.name: nGPUs
parameters.description: Number of GPUs to use for processing.

parameters.name: nCpuCores
parameters.description: Number of CPU cores to use for processing. Overridden to 1 if limit_to_one_core is true.

parameters.name: symmetry
parameters.description: Symmetry of the particle. Values from set (C1, C2, ..., CX, O, I). Parsed as a string value. Overridden to 'C1' if force_no_symmetry is true.

parameters.name: PIXEL_SIZE
parameters.description: Pixel size in SI units (meters). Generates derived parameters pixel_size_si and pixel_size_angstroms.

parameters.name: Cs
parameters.description: Spherical aberration coefficient in SI units (meters). If Cs==0 and AMPCONT is set, Cs is silently changed to 1e-10 to avoid division by zero.

parameters.name: VOLTAGE
parameters.description: Accelerating voltage in volts (e.g. 300000 for 300kV).

parameters.name: AMPCONT
parameters.description: Amplitude contrast fraction (0 to 1). Typically 0.07-0.10 for cryo-EM.

parameters.name: Pca_clusters
parameters.description: Number of PCA clusters. Required parameter with no default; error thrown if missing.

parameters.name: fastScratchDisk
parameters.description: Path to a fast scratch disk for caching. If set to 'ram', checks EMC_CACHE_MEM environment variable (requires >=32 GB) and uses MCR_CACHE_ROOT. Parsed as a string value.

parameters.name: nPeaks
parameters.description: Early development parameter. Number of orientations to store during template matching for further refinement.

parameters.name: CUTPADDING
parameters.description: Extra padding (in pixels) added when cutting out sub-tomograms for further processing. Anticipates shifts etc. Not well tested. Value is stored in subTomoMeta when used in average3d.

parameters.name: whitenPS
parameters.description: Power spectrum whitening parameters (3-element array). Third element is used as the wiener_constant derived parameter.

parameters.name: Fsc_bfactor
parameters.description: Default B-factor applied to re-weighting when generating fully corrected volumes. Positive corresponds to sharpening, negative to low-pass.

parameters.name: flgCones
parameters.description: Flag for cone-based FSC calculations. NOTE: Bug found -- when flgCones is not set, it assigns false to emc.Fsc_bfactor instead of emc.flgCones.

parameters.name: flgQualityWeight
parameters.description: Used to downweight higher frequencies based on relative CCC scores. Based on Grigorieff's approach with edge-case handling for tomo. Overwritten if cycle==0 since template matching scores are SNR not CCC.

parameters.name: filterDefocus
parameters.description: Experimental downweighting of higher frequency information farther from focus. Filtering by defocus using exp[-(%d*(argmax(def-1,0,5).*q)^%d)].

parameters.name: refine_defocus_cisTEM
parameters.description: Whether to refine defocus values using cisTEM.

parameters.name: rerun_refinement_cisTEM
parameters.description: Whether to re-run cisTEM refinement.

parameters.name: cisTEM_invert_tilt_for_defocus_calc
parameters.description: Whether to invert the tilt angle for defocus calculation in cisTEM. Must be 0 or 1.

parameters.name: cisTEM_astigmatism_angle_convention_switch
parameters.description: Astigmatism angle convention switch for cisTEM. Must be 0 or 90.

parameters.name: cisTEM_output_tile_size
parameters.description: Output tile size for cisTEM processing. 0 means use dynamic calculation.

parameters.name: flgCutOutVolumes
parameters.description: Flag to cut out sub-volumes.

parameters.name: track_stats
parameters.description: Whether to track processing statistics.

parameters.name: alt_cache
parameters.description: Optional comma-separated list of writable cache directories. Parsed as a string, then split into a cell array. Each directory must exist. Stored as a cell array of directory paths.

parameters.name: metadata_format
parameters.description: Storage format for subTomoMeta. Validated against allowed values (case-insensitive). Stored as lowercase.

parameters.name: helical_search_theta_constraint
parameters.description: For helix or filament with axis on Z, constrains the search angles to +/- this many degrees from the X/Y plane. A full search should still be specified. Only affects templateSearch.

parameters.name: eucentric_fit
parameters.description: Whether to use eucentric fit.

parameters.name: eucentric_minTilt
parameters.description: Maximum tilt for eucentric fit. NOTE: Bug found -- parameter is named eucentric_minTilt but the assert and default are applied to eucentric_maxTilt. The isfield check looks for eucentric_minTilt but the assert and default assign to eucentric_maxTilt.

parameters.name: ccc_cutoff
parameters.description: CCC cutoff threshold. If > 1, keeps that many subtomos; if < 1, keeps that fraction. TODO: these should be two different orthogonal parameters.

parameters.name: projectVolumes
parameters.description: Whether to project volumes.

parameters.name: classification
parameters.description: Whether the cycle is expected to be used for classification or alignment. Eventually the distinction should not matter.

parameters.name: multi_reference_alignment
parameters.description: Multi-reference alignment mode. 0=off, 1 or 2 for different modes.

parameters.name: scale_calc_size
parameters.description: Zero padding factor for volumes before alignment/FFT operations.

parameters.name: limit_to_one_core
parameters.description: Limits processing to one CPU core. When true, overrides nCpuCores to 1.

parameters.name: force_no_symmetry
parameters.description: Forces symmetry to C1. If true, overrides the symmetry parameter to 'C1'. NOTE: Bug found -- the default is true, which means by default symmetry is always forced to C1, regardless of what the user specifies for symmetry. This is almost certainly a bug; the default should be false.

parameters.name: Pca_constrain_symmetry
parameters.description: Whether to constrain symmetry during PCA classification.

parameters.name: fsc_with_chimera
parameters.description: Whether to generate FSC visualizations using Chimera.

parameters.name: minimum_particle_for_fsc_weighting
parameters.description: Minimum particle fraction for FSC weighting.

parameters.name: fsc_shape_mask
parameters.description: FSC shape mask scaling factor.

parameters.name: shape_mask_lowpass
parameters.description: Low-pass filter cutoff (in Angstroms) applied to the shape mask.

parameters.name: shape_mask_threshold
parameters.description: Threshold value (in sigma) for binarizing the shape mask.

parameters.name: shape_mask_test
parameters.description: Whether to write out shape masks for visual inspection/testing.

parameters.name: pca_scale_spaces
parameters.description: PCA scale-space parameter(s). Can be a single value or array. The number of elements is stored as derived parameter n_scale_spaces.

parameters.name: Pca_maxEigs
parameters.description: Maximum number of eigenvalues/eigenvectors to compute in PCA.

parameters.name: Pca_randSubset
parameters.description: Number of random subset particles to use for PCA. 0 means use all particles.

parameters.name: distance_metric
parameters.description: Distance metric for clustering. Allowed values validated inside BH_clusterPub.m.

parameters.name: n_replicates
parameters.description: Number of replicates for K-means clustering.

parameters.name: Pca_refineKmeans
parameters.description: Whether to refine K-means clustering results.

parameters.name: Pca_flattenEigs
parameters.description: Whether to flatten eigenvalues (normalize eigenvalue magnitudes) before clustering.

parameters.name: Pca_use_real_space_conv
parameters.description: Whether to use real-space convolution instead of Fourier-space for PCA.

parameters.name: Pca_som_coverSteps
parameters.description: Number of covering steps for Self-Organizing Map (SOM) classification.

parameters.name: Pca_som_initNeighbor
parameters.description: Initial neighborhood size for SOM classification.

parameters.name: Pca_som_topologyFcn
parameters.description: Topology function for SOM classification. Default is 'hextop'. TODO: assert on allowed values.

parameters.name: gmm_covariance_type
parameters.description: GMM covariance matrix type. Specifying 'diagonal' with shared covariance approximates K-means.

parameters.name: gmm_covariance_shared_between_clusters
parameters.description: Whether GMM covariance is shared between clusters. When true with diagonal covariance, approximates K-means.

parameters.name: gmm_regularize_value
parameters.description: Regularization value added to GMM covariance diagonal to prevent singularity.

parameters.name: spike_prior
parameters.description: Whether to apply a spike prior during classification.

parameters.name: update_class_by_ccc
parameters.description: Whether to update class assignments by best reference CCC score. Only active when multi_reference_alignment is nonzero; forced to false otherwise.

parameters.name: move_reference_by_com
parameters.description: Whether to move the reference by its center of mass.

parameters.name: use_new_grid_search
parameters.description: Whether to use the new grid search algorithm for angular sampling.

parameters.name: save_mapback_classes
parameters.description: Whether to save per-class map-back volumes (color map visualization).

parameters.name: only_use_reference_classes
parameters.description: Whether to only use reference classes during tomoCPR.

parameters.name: flgPreShift
parameters.description: Pre-shift coordinates for translating between IMOD and emClarity coordinate systems. TODO: should be re-examined.

parameters.name: flgPostShift
parameters.description: Post-shift coordinates for translating between IMOD and emClarity coordinate systems. TODO: should be re-examined.

parameters.name: prjVectorShift
parameters.description: Projection vector shift for coordinate transformations.

parameters.name: pixelShift
parameters.description: Pixel shift offset for coordinate system adjustments.

parameters.name: pixelMultiplier
parameters.description: Pixel multiplier for coordinate system adjustments.

parameters.name: tomoCprLowPass
parameters.description: Low-pass filter cutoff for tomoCPR processing. Warning printed if outside 20-44 range.

parameters.name: tomoCPR_random_subset
parameters.description: Number of random subset particles for tomoCPR. -1 means use all.

parameters.name: tomoCPR_n_particles_minimum
parameters.description: Minimum number of particles required for tomoCPR processing.

parameters.name: tomoCPR_target_n_patches_x_y
parameters.description: Target number of patches in X and Y for tomoCPR local alignment.

parameters.name: probabilityPeakiness
parameters.description: Probability peakiness parameter. Possibly removed (per comment: 'I think this has been removed').

parameters.name: whitenProjections
parameters.description: Power spectrum whitening factor applied to projections during tomoCPR.

parameters.name: rot_option_global
parameters.description: Rotation option for global tilt alignment. Passed to IMOD tiltalign.

parameters.name: rot_option_local
parameters.description: Rotation option for local tilt alignment. Passed to IMOD tiltalign.

parameters.name: rot_default_grouping_global
parameters.description: Default grouping for global rotation alignment. Passed to IMOD tiltalign.

parameters.name: rot_default_grouping_local
parameters.description: Default grouping for local rotation alignment. Passed to IMOD tiltalign.

parameters.name: mag_option_global
parameters.description: Magnification option for global tilt alignment. Passed to IMOD tiltalign.

parameters.name: mag_option_local
parameters.description: Magnification option for local tilt alignment. Passed to IMOD tiltalign.

parameters.name: mag_default_grouping_global
parameters.description: Default grouping for global magnification alignment. Passed to IMOD tiltalign.

parameters.name: mag_default_grouping_local
parameters.description: Default grouping for local magnification alignment. Passed to IMOD tiltalign.

parameters.name: tilt_option_global
parameters.description: Tilt option for global tilt alignment. Passed to IMOD tiltalign.

parameters.name: tilt_option_local
parameters.description: Tilt option for local tilt alignment. Passed to IMOD tiltalign.

parameters.name: tilt_default_grouping_global
parameters.description: Default grouping for global tilt alignment. Passed to IMOD tiltalign.

parameters.name: tilt_default_grouping_local
parameters.description: Default grouping for local tilt alignment. Passed to IMOD tiltalign.

parameters.name: peak_mask_fraction
parameters.description: Fraction of the volume used as a peak mask during cross-correlation. NOTE: Bug found -- the assert references emc.flgPeakMask instead of emc.peak_mask_fraction.

parameters.name: min_overlap
parameters.description: Minimum overlap fraction for tomoCPR patch alignment.

parameters.name: k_factor_scaling
parameters.description: K-factor scaling for dose weighting. Default is NaN (uses automatic calculation).

parameters.name: shift_z_to_to_centroid
parameters.description: Whether to shift the Z coordinate to the particle centroid.

parameters.name: tomo_cpr_defocus_range
parameters.description: Defocus search range in meters for tomoCPR CTF refinement (default 500 nm).

parameters.name: tomo_cpr_defocus_step
parameters.description: Defocus step size in meters for tomoCPR CTF refinement (default 100 nm).

parameters.name: tomo_cpr_defocus_refine
parameters.description: Whether to refine defocus during tomoCPR processing.

parameters.name: tomo_cpr_astigmatism_angle_range
parameters.description: Maximum astigmatism angle change allowed during refinement in radians (default pi/4 = 45 degrees).

parameters.name: tomo_cpr_upsample_factor
parameters.description: Fourier upsampling factor for sub-pixel cross-correlation peak finding.

parameters.name: tomo_cpr_upsample_window
parameters.description: Half-width of the upsampling window in pixels (default 8, giving a 17x17 window).

parameters.name: tomo_cpr_maximum_iterations
parameters.description: Maximum number of ADAM optimizer iterations for per-tilt CTF refinement.

parameters.name: tomo_cpr_z_offset_bound_factor
parameters.description: Per-particle Z offset bound as a multiple of the maximum allowed XY shift.

parameters.name: print_alignment_stats
parameters.description: Whether to print alignment statistics during processing.

parameters.name: printShiftsInParticleBasis
parameters.description: Whether to print shifts in particle basis (vs tomogram basis).

parameters.name: ML_compressByFactor
parameters.description: Compression factor for maximum likelihood alignment.

parameters.name: ML_angleTolerance
parameters.description: Angular tolerance in degrees for maximum likelihood alignment.

parameters.name: mtf_value
parameters.description: Modulation transfer function correction value.

parameters.name: n_tilt_workers
parameters.description: Number of tilt processes to run in parallel in ctf 3d.

parameters.name: useSurfaceFit
parameters.description: Whether to use surface fit for defocus estimation.

parameters.name: test_flip_defocus_offset
parameters.description: Test parameter to flip defocus offset sign.

parameters.name: test_flip_tilt_offset
parameters.description: Test parameter to flip tilt offset sign.

parameters.name: run_tomocpr_alignments
parameters.description: Number of tiltalign processes to run in parallel in tomoCPR. Default 0 means manually re-run while sorting out the optimization process.

parameters.name: set_defocus_origin_using_subtomos
parameters.description: Set defocus origin using sub-tomogram positions. Generally useful for single-particle-like projects. Not useful when substantial non-specimen density exists. Defaulted to false since most people use other software for high-res in vitro work.

parameters.name: max_ctf3dDepth
parameters.description: Maximum depth (in meters) for 3D CTF correction slab thickness (default 100 nm).

parameters.name: expand_lines
parameters.description: Whether to expand lines in reconstruction.

parameters.name: super_sample
parameters.description: Super-sampling factor for reconstruction. NOTE: code has a stray expression 'emc.super_sample' (line 857) that prints the value before the assert -- likely a debug leftover.

parameters.name: debug_print
parameters.description: Debug print mode. Replaces emc_debug_print global variable. NOTE: This parameter is checked/defaulted twice in the file (lines 863-867 and 1088-1092); the second occurrence is redundant.

parameters.name: tmp_model_scale
parameters.description: Template model scale factor. -1 inverts contrast, 1 keeps original.

parameters.name: use_defocus_from_emc
parameters.description: Whether to use defocus values from emClarity rather than external estimation.

parameters.name: tmp_scan
parameters.description: Template scan parameters (3-element array) controlling scanning directions and mode.

parameters.name: Tmp_bandpass
parameters.description: Template matching bandpass filter parameters [high_pass, low_pass, rolloff] in Angstroms.

parameters.name: Tmp_half_precision
parameters.description: Whether to use half-precision (float16) during template matching for reduced GPU memory usage.

parameters.name: Pca_bandpass
parameters.description: PCA bandpass filter parameters [high_pass, low_pass, rolloff] in Angstroms.

parameters.name: autoAli_switchAxes
parameters.description: Whether to switch axes during auto-alignment of tilt series.

parameters.name: ctf_tile_size
parameters.description: Tile size for CTF estimation. Default is dynamically calculated as floor(680e-10 / pixel_size_si), then made even. Post-processed to ensure even value.

parameters.name: ctf_tile_overlap
parameters.description: Overlap factor between adjacent tiles during CTF estimation.

parameters.name: deltaZTolerance
parameters.description: Delta Z tolerance in meters for CTF estimation (default 100 nm).

parameters.name: zShift
parameters.description: Z shift in meters for CTF calculations (default 150 nm).

parameters.name: ctfMaxNumberOfTiles
parameters.description: Maximum number of tiles used during CTF estimation.

parameters.name: remove_duplicates
parameters.description: Whether to remove duplicate particles.

parameters.name: PHASE_PLATE_SHIFT
parameters.description: Phase plate shift values. Input values are multiplied by pi when stored. Default [0,0] means no phase plate.

parameters.name: paddedSize
parameters.description: Padded size for CTF operations. Standardized on 768 as default.

parameters.name: erase_beads_after_ctf
parameters.description: Whether to erase gold beads after CTF correction.

parameters.name: testFlipSign
parameters.description: Sign flip test for defocus (legacy parameter). Also sets derived parameter defShiftSign to the same value.

parameters.name: mapBackIter
parameters.description: Map back iteration counter.

parameters.name: force_no_defocus_stretch
parameters.description: Force no defocus stretch in CTF refinement.

parameters.name: fraction_of_extra_tilt_data
parameters.description: Fraction of extra tilt data to use in refinement.

parameters.name: conserveDiskSpace
parameters.description: Disk conservation level. 0=keep all intermediates, 1=remove some, 2=aggressive removal.

parameters.name: removeBottomPercent
parameters.description: Remove bottom percentage of particles based on scores.

parameters.name: lowResCut
parameters.description: Low resolution cutoff in Angstroms.

parameters.name: symmetry_constrained_search
parameters.description: Whether to constrain alignment search based on symmetry. NOTE: This parameter appears in stringValues list but is assert-checked as a boolean. The boolean assert should take precedence at runtime since it runs after parsing.

parameters.name: oneOverCosineDose
parameters.description: Whether to use 1/cos(tilt) dose weighting to account for increased dose at higher tilts.

parameters.name: startingAngle
parameters.description: Starting angle in degrees for dose accumulation calculation.

parameters.name: startingDirection
parameters.description: Starting direction for tilt series acquisition. Parsed as a string value.

parameters.name: doseSymmetricIncrement
parameters.description: Dose symmetric increment. 0 means not dose-symmetric; otherwise the number of tilts per sweep.

parameters.name: doseAtMinTilt
parameters.description: Accumulated dose at the minimum tilt angle (in e-/A^2).

parameters.name: shape_mask_lowpass_override
parameters.description: Override for binary mask low-pass (replaces bh_global_binary_mask_low_pass). 0 means use shape_mask_lowpass value.

parameters.name: shape_mask_threshold_override
parameters.description: Override for binary mask threshold (replaces bh_global_binary_mask_threshold). 0 means use shape_mask_threshold value.

parameters.name: pca_mask_threshold
parameters.description: PCA mask threshold (replaces bh_global_binary_pcaMask_threshold).

parameters.name: particle_volume_scaling
parameters.description: Volume scaling factor for particle volume estimation (replaces bh_global_vol_est_scaling).

parameters.name: phase_plate_mode
parameters.description: Whether phase plate mode is enabled (replaces bh_global_turn_on_phase_plate).

parameters.name: use_fourier_interp
parameters.description: Whether to use Fourier interpolation for 2D operations (replaces bh_global_do_2d_fourier_interp).

parameters.name: enable_profiling
parameters.description: Whether to enable MATLAB profiling (replaces bh_global_do_profile).

parameters.name: save_tomocpr_diagnostics
parameters.description: Whether to save tomoCPR diagnostic outputs (replaces bh_global_save_tomoCPR_diagnostics). Currently unused but kept for future use.

parameters.name: Ali_mType
parameters.description: Alignment mask type. Parsed as a string value.

parameters.name: Cls_mType
parameters.description: Classification mask type. Parsed as a string value.

parameters.name: Raw_mType
parameters.description: Raw alignment mask type. Parsed as a string value.

parameters.name: Fsc_mType
parameters.description: FSC mask type. Parsed as a string value.

parameters.name: Kms_mType
parameters.description: K-means mask type. Parsed as a string value.

parameters.name: Peak_mType
parameters.description: Peak mask type. Parsed as a string value.

parameters.name: flgPrecision
parameters.description: Floating point precision flag ('single' or 'double'). Parsed as a string value.

parameters.name: Tmp_xcfScale
parameters.description: Template cross-correlation scaling method. Parsed as a string value.

parameters.name: Tmp_eraseMaskType
parameters.description: Template erase mask type. Parsed as a string value.

parameters.name: Pca_distMeasure
parameters.description: PCA distance measure. Deprecated in favor of distance_metric. Parsed as a string value.

derived_parameters.name: pixel_size_si
derived_parameters.description: Pixel size in SI units (meters). Same as PIXEL_SIZE.

derived_parameters.name: wiener_constant
derived_parameters.description: Wiener filter constant, extracted as third element of whitenPS.

derived_parameters.name: n_scale_spaces
derived_parameters.description: Number of PCA scale spaces, computed from the length of pca_scale_spaces array.

derived_parameters.name: defShiftSign
derived_parameters.description: Defocus shift sign, alias for testFlipSign for backward compatibility. Default -1.

derived_parameters.name: ctf_tile_size_postprocessed
derived_parameters.description: CTF tile size is post-processed to ensure it is even. Applied whether user-specified or default.

bugs_found.description: flgCones default writes to wrong field. When flgCones is NOT set, the else branch assigns 'emc.Fsc_bfactor = false' instead of 'emc.flgCones = false'. This silently overwrites the Fsc_bfactor default (40.0) with false (0) whenever flgCones is not specified in the parameter file.

eucentric_minTilt / eucentric_maxTilt name mismatch. The isfield check tests for 'eucentric_minTilt' but the EMC_assert_numeric and default assignment use 'eucentric_maxTilt'. If a user specifies eucentric_minTilt, the assert validates eucentric_maxTilt (which may not exist yet), and the default is assigned to eucentric_maxTilt. The parameter eucentric_minTilt itself is never validated or defaulted.

force_no_symmetry defaults to true, which forces symmetry='C1' for ALL users who do not explicitly set force_no_symmetry=0. This means the required 'symmetry' parameter is always overridden to C1 by default, making it effectively ignored. The default should almost certainly be false.

peak_mask_fraction assert references wrong variable. When the user specifies 'peak_mask_fraction', the assert checks 'emc.flgPeakMask' (which likely does not exist), causing an error. Should be EMC_assert_numeric(emc.peak_mask_fraction, 1).

Stray debug expression in super_sample. The line 'emc.super_sample' appears alone (not assigned or passed to a function), which in MATLAB prints the value to the console. This is likely a forgotten debug statement.

debug_print is checked and defaulted twice. The parameter is handled at both line 863 and line 1088, with identical logic. The second occurrence is redundant and could mask bugs if only one is updated.
Cls_mType appears twice in the stringValues cell array. This is harmless but indicates a copy-paste error.

symmetry_constrained_search is listed in stringValues (parsed as string) but then checked with EMC_assert_boolean. If the user specifies this parameter, it will be stored as a string, and the boolean assert may behave unexpectedly since MATLAB string comparison with 0/1 differs from numeric comparison.
